description: Style NoteA love-forever classic, this murcia bag is a closet essential. Perfect for colour blocking and mix-and-match ensembles, make this piece your go-to essential to add a fresh twist to off-duty staples.Product DetailsPink handbag, external pocket with magnetic closure and zip, two inner compartments divided by a zipped pocket, mobile pouch, inner side zipped pocket , two short handles, fabric zip pullsMaterial and CareLeatheretteWipe with cloth when requiredSizeLength: 15 cmWidth: 30 cmDepth: 8 cm
